item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crispy chicken burger with tomato, cucumber, lettuce, onion, ketchup and Thousand Island dressing. (1+2+6+8+11+13+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Crispy chickpea patty in a burger bun with tomato, cucumber, lettuce, onion, ketchup and Thousand Island dressing. (1+2+6+8+11+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Beef kebab pizza served with Mediterranean roasted home fries. Served with salad, herb dressing, harissa ketchup and garlic dressing. Also available gluten-free. (1+2+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish GREEN DISH: kebab pizza served with Mediterranean roasted home fries. Served with salad, herb dressing, harissa ketchup and garlic dressing. Also available gluten-free. (1+2+6+11+15) Sprout Meal salads from Sprout are available in the restaurant all summer: fresh seasonal vegetables with a protein of your choice.
